title: Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple
tagline: Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple or Kaliyaperumal temple is a Hindu temple located at Kallankurichi in the Ariyalur district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple or Kaliyaperumal temple is a Hindu temple located at Kallankurichi in the Ariyalur district of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is situated 10 km (6.2 mi) from Ariyalur and is dedicated to Perumal (Vishnu).

topPlaces.name: Siruvalur (Ariyalur)
topPlaces.description: Siruvalur is a village in Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The village has its own government high school which it is planning to upgrade to a higher secondary school.

topPlaces.name: Ariyalur taluk
topPlaces.description: Ariyalur taluk is a taluk of Ariyalur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Ariyalur.

topPlaces.name: Ariyalur
topPlaces.description: Ariyalur (Tamil: [aɾijaluːɾ]) is a town and district headquarters of Ariyalur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu and is rich in limestone, surrounded with seven cement factories and two sugar factories. The town is located at a distance of 310 km (190 mi) from the state capital Chennai.

topPlaces.name: Ariyalur division
topPlaces.description: Ariyalur division is a revenue division in the Ariyalur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Kallankurichi is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Ammenabath is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Ottakoil is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
Siruvalur is a village in Ariyalur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The village has its own government high school which it is planning to upgrade to a higher secondary school.
Ariyalur North is a village in the Ariyalur taluk of Ariyalur district, Trichy Region, Tamil Nadu, India.
Ariyalur taluk is a taluk of Ariyalur district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Ariyalur.

Ariyalur (Tamil: [aɾijaluːɾ]) is a town and district headquarters of Ariyalur district in the South Indian state of Tamil Nadu and is rich in limestone, surrounded with seven cement factories and two sugar factories. The town is located at a distance of 310 km (190 mi) from the state capital Chennai.
Ariyalur division is a revenue division in the Ariyalur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (61 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kaliyuga Varadaraja Perumal Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kallankurichi, Ammenabath, Ottakoil, Siruvalur (Ariyalur), Ariyalur (North).
